Event: Titanic Excavation - Dec 2025
Event Date: 26/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI288
Fang of Ice Ring

Once in a while, the ring wearer steals 30% physical and magic armor from 2 random enemy units for 4 sec,. and applies deep freeze effect to them for 3 sec. The ring wearer also explodes the targets of the ability, dealing physical damage equal to 200% of the caster's physical armor to them, and to all enemy units in a small radius around them. For 4 sec., the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown time of their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 4 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the targets of the ability explode and receive 500000 magic damage. Icicles fly out of them, hitting 2 nearest enemy units. On hit, the icicles deal 350000 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec., and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 55% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Cooldown: 8 secs
